_comment: Known Identity Providers (IDPs) that legitimately receive cross-eTLD+1 form POSTs during OAuth / SSO / SAML flows. When a page's form action eTLD+1 matches one of these, the cross-eTLD+1 credential signals (dom.password_cross_etld1_post / otp_cross_etld1_post / card_cross_etld1_post) are suppressed — without this list, every legitimate 'Sign in with Google / Microsoft / Apple' flow would falsely score as credential_harvest.

etld1s: eTLD+1 strings, lowercased; matches against the form-action eTLD+1, not the page's
